reviews.review_description:
This game is very fun and well designed. 
I have 2 suggestions to take it to another level of reality. First would be having other players at the table with you. It would make very fun to play with friends and random people as in real casinos. 
The other suggestions would be to have a hand tracking system so you could make gestures to hit or stand. Like tapping on the table to hit or waving your hand to stand. 
It would made a very realistic playing. 
I would definitely pay for a game like that. 
Congratulations to the developers.
This is a fun, realistic blackjack game. It's very relaxed and easy to play. The dealer has a good sense of humor.
